title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 171.171 - Full credit to be given work completed in accredited schools
text:
171.171.  Full credit to be given work completed in accredited schools. — Work completed in schools accredited by the state board of education shall be given full credit in requirements for entrance to and classification in any educational institution supported in whole or in part by state appropriation.
(L. 1963 p. 200 § 11-17) 
(Source: RSMo 1959 § 160.090)
